MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling re: DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings. Judge Goldsmith is recused. Per order of the Presiding Judge, this motion will be heard by Judge Stewart on the same date (March 27, 2014) at 1:30 pm in Dept. 613. (SEE MINUTES D613) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

Defendant Wells Fargo Bank, N.A.'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Mar-27-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Set for hearing on Thursday, March 27, 2014, in Dept. 302, line 6. DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings. Judge Goldsmith is recused. Per order of the Presiding Judge, this motion will be heard by Judge Stewart on March 27, 2014, at 1:30 pm in Dept. 613.

Appearances: (Held in D613 before Hon. John K. Stewart)
Steven Costa, Esq. for Randy McDowell
Andrew Elliott, Esq. for Wells Fargo Bank
Reported by Kathryn Lloyd CSR# 5955

DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings. Argued by both sides. Court's Tentative is the ruling to wit:

Granted without leave to amend as to the first cause of action.
The First Amended Complaint ("FAC") does not plead facts establishing all the elements of malicious prosecution.

Denied as to the second cause of action. The FAC adequately pleads facts establishing that Plaintiff was denied "equal accommodations and services based on his race."

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-28-2013 Continued To May-05-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Off Calendar Sep-04-2013 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Responses To Discovery And Related Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-15-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Steven Costa, Esq. of the Law Office of Steven Costa, Tel. 415.986.1338, for plaintiff and moving party;
Kevin MacDougald, Esq. of the Law Office of Kevin MacDougald, Tel. 415.492.8734, for defendant and opposing party.

RULING: The matter was argued. At the conclusion of argument, the Court takes PLAINTIFF RANDY MCDOWELL'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Discovery And Related Request For Sanctions under submission. Judge Pro Tem: James Watson; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.
